title: Cron: run cleanup every Monday at 04:30 UTC
prompt: Add a single cron entry to an Oban plugin config: run `MyApp.Workers.WeeklyCleanupWorker` every Monday at 04:30 UTC. The crontab entry uses the 5-field format. Include the full `config :my_app, Oban` block with `repo: MyApp.Repo`, a `cleanup:` queue at concurrency 2, and the `Oban.Plugins.Cron` plugin. Write to `config/config.exs`.
tier_rationale: 5-field cron with a day-of-week digit; no timezone complication.
